title: Itho Intha Nenjodu Song Lyrics Good Luck
stanzas:
Itho Intha Nenjodu Song Lyrics Good Luck
#GoodLuck #SPB #KSChitra

Idho enthan nenjodu
orey veeduthan
orey veedu ullathellaam
nee vazhthaan.

unadhu uyiril
sari paadhi konden
enadhu uyiril
muzhumaiyum thandhen.

ovvondrum mudiyum
endur vingyaanam sollum.
nam kadhal mudiyaadhendru
en niyaanam sollum

kaalangal vazhum kaalame
nam kadhal ellai vazhume
en kaigal unnil neelume
imaikkaamal unnai aalume.

nilavai madithu
un koonthal mudippen
vinmeen parithu
maniyaaram thoduppen.

vaeredhum vendaam vendaam
un maarbu podhum.
uyir pogum kaalam koodu
oru paarvai podhum.

un sollil vedham ketkiren
un kannil ennai paarkiren
unnodu ennai serkiren.
un maarbil kannam theikkiren.

Idho enthan nenjodu
orey veeduthan
orey veedu ullathellaam
nee vazhthaan.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Itho Intha Nenjodu?

The song explores themes of love and longing, capturing the emotional depth of a romantic relationship.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is beautifully sung by K.S.Chitra and SPB.

Who composed the music for Good Luck?

The music for the movie was composed by Manoj Bhatnaghar.

What is the release year of the movie Good Luck?

The movie was released in the year 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Itho Intha Nenjodu from the movie Good Luck is a romantic duet that delves into the emotions of love and longing. Sung by the legendary K.S.Chitra and SPB, the melody beautifully conveys the depth of a heartfelt connection. The lyrics reflect a sense of yearning and emotional intimacy, making it a perfect choice for moments of reflection and romance. The music by Manoj Bhatnaghar enhances the song's emotional impact, creating a timeless piece that resonates with listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting blend of Itho Intha Nenjodu from the movie Good Luck, where the legendary voices of K.S.Chitra and SPB create a magical melody. This song beautifully captures the essence of love and longing, set to the soulful music of Manoj Bhatnaghar. Dive into a world of emotions with this timeless duet that resonates with the heart.
stanzaMeanings: Here in my heart, there's only one home, and you live in every part of it.
I lit a lamp in the fire of life. I took myself and pushed myself forward.
I split my life and gave you half, and kept the rest for myself.
I took half of your life and gave you all of mine.
Science says everything will end. My wisdom says our love will never end.
Time will pass, but our love will have no limits. My hands will reach out to you and hold you without blinking.
You opened your heart like a garden. What will you do for me now?
I will braid your hair with the moonlight and touch the stars like jewels.
I don't need anything else, your embrace is enough. A single glance is enough when life ends.
I hear sacred words in your speech. I see myself in your eyes. I join myself with you and rest my cheek on your chest.
Here in my heart, there's only one home, and you live in every part of it.
I lit a lamp in the fire of life. I took myself and pushed myself forward.
